description: Skills specific to consulting delivery and methodology. Consulting roles heavily reuse existing cross-sector skills (analytical_thinking, stakeholder_management, communication, strategic_thinking, process_improvement, etc.). These new skills capture what is distinctly consulting-flavored — the client engagement model, structured frameworks, and advisory delivery patterns.

skills.name: Client Engagement Delivery
skills.description: Managing consulting engagements end-to-end: scoping work, defining deliverables, managing timelines, coordinating teams, and ensuring quality delivery against client expectations. Distinct from general project management in that the 'product' is advisory work with defined engagement boundaries, client sign-off gates, and deliverable-based milestones.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Supports engagement logistics and tracks deliverables under supervision. Understands engagement lifecycle phases (discovery, analysis, delivery, closeout). Maintains project trackers and meeting notes.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Owns workstream delivery within an engagement. Manages scope, timeline, and deliverable quality for their workstream. Proactively identifies risks and escalates appropriately. Coordinates across client and internal teams.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Leads complex, multi-workstream engagements end-to-end. Manages engagement economics (pricing, utilization, margins). Navigates scope changes and client escalations. Ensures consistent quality across parallel workstreams and team members.

skills.name: Consulting Frameworks & Structured Analysis
skills.description: Applying structured problem-solving frameworks to decompose complex business problems into analyzable components. Includes hypothesis-driven analysis, MECE structuring, issue trees, root cause analysis, and benchmarking methodologies. The core analytical toolkit of management and strategy consulting.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Understands core frameworks (MECE, issue trees, Porter's Five Forces, SWOT). Can apply a given framework to structure an analysis. Conducts benchmarking with guidance.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Selects and adapts frameworks to fit specific client problems. Develops hypothesis-driven analyses independently. Structures ambiguous problems into workable components. Conducts root-cause analysis and gap assessments.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs custom analytical frameworks for novel or complex problems. Synthesizes multiple frameworks into integrated strategic recommendations. Leads teams through structured problem-solving processes. Develops reusable methodologies and intellectual property.

skills.name: Client Advisory & Trusted Advisor Skills
skills.description: Building and maintaining trusted advisory relationships with client stakeholders from operational teams to C-suite executives. Includes understanding client needs beyond stated requirements, navigating organizational politics, managing expectations, and positioning recommendations for adoption. The relationship-building core of consulting.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Participates in client meetings professionally. Builds rapport with day-to-day client contacts. Communicates clearly and follows through on commitments. Understands the difference between consulting advice and operational support.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages ongoing client relationships at the manager/director level. Proactively identifies unstated client needs and pain points. Navigates organizational dynamics to position recommendations effectively. Handles difficult conversations and manages expectations.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Serves as trusted advisor to C-suite and executive leadership. Influences strategic decisions and long-term client direction. Manages complex multi-stakeholder relationships across client organizations. Develops and expands client relationships into new engagement opportunities.

skills.name: Proposal Development & Business Development
skills.description: Developing consulting proposals, responding to RFPs/RFIs, scoping engagements, and pricing advisory work. Includes identifying opportunities within existing client relationships, developing go-to-market approaches for new services, and contributing to practice growth through pipeline development.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Contributes content to proposals and pitch decks. Researches client context and competitive landscape for proposal development. Assists with formatting and assembling proposal documents.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Develops complete proposals including scope, approach, timeline, team composition, and pricing. Responds to RFPs/RFIs with tailored solutions. Identifies upsell and cross-sell opportunities within existing accounts. Supports client presentations and contract negotiations.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Leads complex, high-value proposal efforts. Develops go-to-market strategy for new service offerings. Drives pipeline development and manages sales targets. Negotiates engagement terms and contract structures. Builds strategic partnerships and alliance relationships.

skills.name: Executive Communication & Presentation
skills.description: Communicating complex analyses, findings, and recommendations to senior stakeholders and executives in clear, compelling, and action-oriented formats. Includes developing executive-ready presentations, leading QBRs, facilitating workshops, and translating technical or analytical depth into business language that drives decisions.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Creates clear, well-structured slides and documents. Presents analysis and findings to peer-level audiences. Writes professional reports and summaries. Adapts communication style to audience.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Develops and delivers executive-level presentations to VP and director-level stakeholders. Leads client workshops and facilitation sessions. Structures complex narratives into compelling storylines. Prepares and delivers Quarterly Business Reviews.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Presents strategic recommendations to C-suite audiences with confidence and executive presence. Leads high-stakes client presentations and board-level briefings. Develops thought leadership content for external publication. Represents the firm at industry conferences and events.

skills.name: Risk, Compliance & Internal Audit
skills.description: Conducting risk assessments, compliance reviews, internal audits, and control evaluations for client organizations. Includes SOX compliance, COSO framework application, regulatory compliance, GRC program design, and remediation planning. Covers both financial risk and operational risk domains.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Supports internal audit procedures and control testing. Documents process flows and risk matrices. Understands SOX compliance requirements and COSO framework basics. Assists with evidence gathering and audit workpapers.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Leads risk assessments and compliance reviews independently. Designs control frameworks and remediation plans. Conducts SOX walkthroughs and tests control effectiveness. Identifies gaps and develops actionable mitigation strategies. Partners with finance, IT, and legal teams.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs enterprise risk management programs and GRC architectures. Leads complex, multi-domain compliance engagements. Advises C-suite on risk posture and regulatory strategy. Develops new audit and compliance methodologies. Coordinates with external auditors and regulators.

skills.name: Financial Due Diligence & M&A Advisory
skills.description: Conducting financial due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investment processes. Includes analyzing financial statements, identifying risks and red flags, evaluating cost structures, assessing revenue quality, and generating business insights for investors, shareholders, and management teams preparing for transactions.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Assists with data collection and financial analysis for due diligence engagements. Reviews financial reports and identifies basic anomalies. Supports preparation of due diligence reports and data rooms.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Leads financial due diligence workstreams independently. Analyzes financial and management reports to generate business insights regarding costs, revenue, and structure. Identifies material risks and red flags. Prepares comprehensive due diligence findings for investors and stakeholders.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Manages end-to-end M&A advisory engagements. Advises investors and management on transaction strategy, valuation considerations, and deal structure. Leads complex multi-party transactions across sectors. Coordinates global due diligence processes across Deloitte/Big 4 network.

skills.name: Digital Transformation & Technology Consulting
skills.description: Advising clients on technology-enabled business transformation including digital strategy, technology architecture decisions, system implementation oversight, and change management. Covers ERP modernization, cloud adoption strategy, AI integration, and platform selection. Distinct from hands-on engineering in that the focus is on strategic guidance and implementation oversight rather than building.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Understands digital transformation concepts and common technology platforms. Supports technology assessments and system evaluation. Assists with requirements gathering and technology vendor analysis.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Leads technology consulting workstreams including architecture assessments, platform selection, and implementation oversight. Translates business requirements into technology solution recommendations. Manages technology change initiatives and adoption programs.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs enterprise-wide digital transformation strategies. Advises C-suite on technology investments, platform modernization, and AI adoption. Leads complex, multi-system transformation programs. Develops technology consulting practice offerings and thought leadership.
